# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Lambda functions with access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Description: Environment name for resource naming

  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Default: myproject
    Description: Project name for resource naming and scoping

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-execution-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  # Basic Lambda execution - scoped to specific log group pattern
  LambdaBasicExecutionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-basic-execution'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: CloudWatchLogsAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - logs:CreateLogGroup
              - logs:CreateLogStream
              - logs:PutLogEvents
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*:*'

  # S3 access - scoped to project-specific buckets
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-s3-access'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: S3ReadAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:GetObjectVersion
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:HeadObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*/*'
          - Sid: S3WriteAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*/*'
          # Explicitly deny access to sensitive patterns
          - Sid: DenyAccessToOtherBuckets
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - s3:*
            NotResource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*/*'

  # DynamoDB access - scoped to project-specific tables
  DynamoDBAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-dynamodb-access'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DynamoDBTableAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - dynamodb:GetItem
              - dynamodb:PutItem
              - dynamodb:UpdateItem
              - dynamodb:DeleteItem
              - dynamodb:Query
              - dynamodb:Scan
              - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
              - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
              - dynamodb:ConditionCheckItem
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*/index/*'
          - Sid: DynamoDBStreamAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DescribeStream
              - dynamodb:GetRecords
              - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
              - dynamodb:ListStreams
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*/stream/*'
          - Sid: DynamoDBDescribeAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DescribeTable
              - dynamodb:DescribeTimeToLive
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'

  # SQS access - scoped to project-specific queues
  SQSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-sqs-access'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: SQSConsumeAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: SQSSendAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:SendMessageBatch
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: SQSListAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:ListQueues
            Resource: '*'

  # SNS access - scoped to project-specific topics
  SNSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-sns-access'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: SNSPublishAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:GetTopicAttributes
              - sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: SNSSubscribeAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:Unsubscribe
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'

  # CloudWatch Metrics and Alarms - scoped access
  CloudWatchAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-cloudwatch-access'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: CloudWatchMetricsAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                cloudwatch:namespace: !Sub '${ProjectName}/${Environment}'
          - Sid: CloudWatchMetricsReadAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - cloudwatch:GetMetricData
              - cloudwatch:GetMetricStatistics
              - cloudwatch:ListMetrics
              - cloudwatch:DescribeAlarms
            Resource: '*'

  # X-Ray tracing support
  XRayAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-xray-access'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: XRayTracingAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - xray:PutTraceSegments
              - xray:PutTelemetryRecords
              - xray:GetSamplingRules
              - xray:GetSamplingTargets
              - xray:GetSamplingStatisticSummaries
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-role-arn'

  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-role-name'

  ResourceNamingConvention:
    Description: Resources must follow this naming convention to be accessible by this role
    Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-<resource-name>'
